data.text: LIGHTER GRAVITY, MILDLY WARM, THICKER ATMOSPHERE
BEAUTIFUL BRIGHT DAYS, YELLOW GRASS IN TEMP.ZONES WITH PLANTS, TREES
POLAR REGIONS ARE BELOW 20, BRIGHT LIGHT BLUE LAND-ICE AND DEEP BLUE
SEA ICE AND FROZEN LAKES. NO PLANTS, FEW ANIMALS
SURELY ONE OF THE MOST BEAUTIFUL WORLDS IN THE GALAXY.
